headline: Con Edison Executives to Attend Financial Conferences in May and June 2026
summary: Consolidated Edison, Inc. ( "Con Edison ") (NYSE: ED) executives will meet with investors at various conferences in May and June 2026. A copy of Con Edison's investor presentation for these meetings can be found on the Presentations & Webcasts page of Con Edison's website. (Select "For Investors " and then select "Presentations & Webcasts.")

headline: Entergy Strengthens Growth Through Nuclear and Grid Investments
summary: ETR leans on its nuclear portfolio and a $57 billion grid plan to drive demand and reliability, but regulatory risks and efficiency trends persist.
